text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know how we had a break? Well, my
homeroom teacher started talking about extra
classes...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
She was all, like, threatening to speak with you if
I didn't go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's just as cringe as threatening to call my
parents, right? So anyway, I went ham. Am I a
model student or what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she didn't get much rest because she had
to prepare for her extra classes. While I praise her
for the hard work, I also advise her to pace her
studies better in the future.
